name: craft-mcp
description: Run craft's read-only repo-hygiene checks from Claude Desktop: count validation, skill-ecosystem governance audit, and docs-staleness — against a craft-family repo you point it at.

tools.name: craft_validate_counts
tools.description: Validate a craft-family plugin's command/skill/agent counts (read-only).

tools.name: craft_governance_audit
tools.description: Run craft's skill-ecosystem governance rules and report violations (read-only).

tools.name: craft_docs_staleness
tools.description: Check a craft-family repo's docs for staleness (read-only; never --fix).
